title: hedyotis yoderi
intro: Hedyotis yoderi, also known as Yoder's buttonweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family. The plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Hedyotis yoderi has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving headaches, and treating respiratory issues like bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are often used to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms associated with colds and flu.
